title: CuantoPal3
summary: Web/mobile grade calculator showing what score is needed to pass a course.
description: CuantoPal3 makes it easy for students to figure out what grade they need on a final exam or project to pass a class. Packed into a slick web interface powered by Astro and React, and wrapped for mobile with Capacitor, the app works seamlessly in the browser or on your phone – drop in your current scores and it instantly tells you what’s required to cross the passing line.
